name: Container Orchestration
description: An orchestrator drives the cluster toward a declared desired state: a manifest is submitted, the scheduler places pods on suitable nodes (scaling out if none fit), images are pulled and containers started under health probes, and a control loop continuously reconciles actual against desired state, correcting any drift.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Declarative desired state"]
    N2["Submit manifest to API"]
    N3["Scheduler places pods"]
    N4{"Suitable node found?"}
    N5["Queue / scale cluster"]
    N6["Pull image + start"]
    N7["Run health probes"]
    N8{"Healthy?"}
    N9["Restart / reschedule"]
    N10["Reconcile actual/desired"]
    N11{"Drift detected?"}
    N12["Desired state held"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 -->|no| N5
    N5 -->|retry| N3
    N4 -->|yes| N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 -->|no| N9
    N9 -->|replace| N3
    N8 -->|yes| N10
    N10 --> N11
    N11 -->|yes| N3
    N11 -->|no| N12

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N12 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Borg, Omega, and Kubernetes
sources.authors: Burns, B.; Grant, B.; Oppenheimer, D.; Brewer, E.; Wilkes, J.
sources.journal: ACM Queue / Communications of the ACM

sources.title: Large-scale cluster management at Google with Borg
sources.authors: Verma, A.; Pedrosa, L.; Korupolu, M.; Oppenheimer, D.; Tune, E.; Wilkes, J.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.
